name: root_happy_path_query
query: Describe the road segment FERGUS CR from COBBLE HILL DR (N) to COBBLE HILL DR (S).
reference: A concise answer is returned with supporting source citations.
description: Root agent should orchestrate retrieval and produce a final answer.

name: root_out_of_scope_query
query: What is the capital of France?
reference: I'm sorry, I can only answer questions related to the City of Ottawa.
description: Root agent should reject clearly out-of-scope queries.
